strengths: Possesses over 15 years of software engineering experience across various tech stacks, meeting the minimum tenure requirement.
Demonstrates entrepreneurial experience by founding and maintaining GISCollective, an open-source Geo-Data platform.
Has practical, recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling at re:cinq.
concerns: Lacks the Director-level strategic leadership and executive-level customer advisory experience required for this role.
AI expertise is limited to a single recent role, missing the deep, recognized industry expertise or advanced AI degree preferred.
The resume indicates a strong focus on tactical, full-stack implementation rather than high-level cloud and AI platform strategy.
response.justification: While Bogdan meets the minimum requirement of 15 years in software engineering and demonstrates strong entrepreneurial initiative through founding GISCollective, his profile does not align with a Director-level AI Strategy role. The position requires deep, recognized AI expertise and experience advising strategic customers on cloud/AI adoption. Bogdan's resume portrays a highly skilled Senior/Staff Full-Stack Developer whose AI exposure is limited to recent tactical work on MCP code generators at re:cinq, lacking the overarching strategic leadership and enterprise advisory experience necessary for this Principal Engineer position.
